name: actor_critic
description: an actor-critic agent loop world with critique; actions act, critique, revise

card.description: an actor-critic agent loop world with critique; actions act, critique, revise

rules: act produces the first draft (quality 40) only when no draft exists yet; otherwise it is a no-op.
critique scores the current draft and sets a pending critique, but only when a draft exists and none is already pending.
revise improves the draft by closing half the gap to 100 and clears the pending critique; it is a no-op unless a critique is pending.
quality is monotonically non-decreasing and bounded in [0, 100]; the loop converges.
the canonical cycle is act, then repeated critique -> revise rounds.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name")

    if name == "act":
        # The actor writes an initial draft, but only if none exists yet.
        if s.get("draft_version", 0) == 0:
            s["draft_version"] = 1
            s["quality"] = max(40, int(s.get("quality", 0)))
            s["pending_critique"] = False
            s["feedback"] = ""
            s["phase"] = "drafted"
        s["last_action"] = "act"
        return s

    if name == "critique":
        # The critic can only judge an existing draft, and only once per draft.
        if s.get("draft_version", 0) >= 1 and not s.get("pending_critique", False):
            quality = int(s.get("quality", 0))
            gap = 100 - quality
            s["critique_score"] = quality
            s["pending_critique"] = True
            s["feedback"] = "raise quality by " + str(gap) + " to reach 100"
            s["phase"] = "critiqued"
        s["last_action"] = "critique"
        return s

    if name == "revise":
        # The actor revises only when a fresh critique is pending.
        if s.get("pending_critique", False):
            quality = int(s.get("quality", 0))
            quality = quality + (100 - quality) // 2
            s["quality"] = quality
            s["draft_version"] = int(s.get("draft_version", 0)) + 1
            s["iterations"] = int(s.get("iterations", 0)) + 1
            s["pending_critique"] = False
            s["feedback"] = ""
            s["phase"] = "revised"
        s["last_action"] = "revise"
        return s

    return s

emit.report: Actor-critic loop @ phase={phase}: draft v{draft_version}, quality {quality}/100 (last critic score {critique_score}), {iterations} revision cycle(s). pending_critique={pending_critique}. feedback: {feedback}
